name: Chicken Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: Skinless boneless chicken breasts or tenderloins
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in the center of a baking dish.
2. Arrange the potatoes on one side and the beans on the other.
3. Melt 1/2 stick of butter/margarine or use olive oil and mix with 2 ozs of water and a dry package of good seasoning dressing (choose your preferred seasoning).
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken, beans, and potatoes.
5. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Remove the foil, stir the potatoes slightly, and continue baking until they are done. This dish is delicious and even better left over.
